description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a casual urban appearance, featuring long straight hair that falls down the back. The individual is dressed in a loose, open shirt layered over a top, paired with fitted pants. The feet are bare, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The facial features are neutral, and the overall build is average, with a natural, upright posture. The clothing and hairstyle suggest a relaxed, everyday style suitable for city streets or parks.
description: An adult pedestrian with long straight hair, wearing a loose shirt over a top and fitted pants, standing upright with bare feet.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open shirt, top, facial features, and relaxed arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the drape of the shirt, and the length of the hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the straight hair and the back of the shirt and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and hair, with visible hand and foot details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual open shirt over a top and fitted pants
